docket_entries.description: SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF JUN-24-2008 - JUDGMENT.
WRIT RETURNED WRIT OF EXECUTION ISSUED TO SAN FRANCISCO COUNTY, RETURNED AND FILED, UNSATISFIED AS TO DEFENDANT ROUPPET, MICHAEL

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF MANES, AUSTIN RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT ROUPPET, MICHAEL $900.00 PRINCIPAL, $60.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $960.00, DEFENDANT NOT PRESENT. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS NO EXHIBITS FILED
WRIT OF EXECUTION ISSUED TO SAN FRANCISCO COUNTY FILED BY PLAINTIFF MANES, AUSTIN AS TO DEFENDANT ROUPPET, MICHAEL

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF JUN-24-2008 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF JUN-24-2008 BY PAUL SLAVIT. PLAINTIFF PRESENT. DEFENDANT NOT PRESENT. PLAINTIFF'S EXHIBITS RETAINED ONLY. CLERK: S. VANTREE. NOT REPORTED. (506).
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $1,180.00 FILED BY MANES, AUSTIN AS TO DEFENDANT ROUPPET, MICHAEL ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR JUN-24-2008 AT 10:00 AM IN DEPT 506
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED SERVED MAY-19-2008, PERSONAL SERVICE AS TO DEFENDANT ROUPPET, MICHAEL
